Risk Desc:
We are currently hiring and onboarding resources to the LD account across different Value Streams. Both Ascendion and LD BGV checks are applicable for the resources.

The Ascendion BGV check takes at least two months, and Client BGV takes two to three weeks for completion. We can onboard the resources and request for LD accesses only after at least LD BGV completion. 

Delay in onboarding resources could lead to client concerns. Project-Level     Organizational                         Resources         Major    Possible      High
Category:
We are creating resource pool to mitigate possible BGV failures

We have to hire and onboard new resource and again start BGV process
